claims.text: Dillier Classic — Race Reference > Personal results, race strategy, power card, and cramp prevention notes live in the events table ( propose_race_* / apply_race_* ).
--- ## Race Overview The Dillier Classic is an annual road cycling sportive in central Switzerland, named after Silvan Dillier.
- Distance: ~127 km - Elevation: ~2,600m - Format: 8 timed climb segments.
The athlete's final result is the aggregate time across all 8 timed climbs only.
